mapper.insert: INSERT INTO sys_role (code, name, status) VALUES (#{code}, #{name}, #{status})
mapper.select: SELECT id, code, name, status, created_at, updated_at FROM sys_role WHERE id = #{id}
SELECT id, code, name, status, created_at, updated_at FROM sys_role ORDER BY id
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM sys_role WHERE code = #{code} AND id != #{excludeId}
SELECT id, parent_id, name, path, component, permission, type, sort_order, status, created_at, updated_at FROM sys_menu ORDER BY sort_order, id
mapper.update: UPDATE sys_menu SET parent_id = #{parentId}, name = #{name}, path = #{path}, component = #{component}, permission = #{permission}, type = #{type}, sort_order = #{sortOrder}, status = #{status}, updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO sys_api_permission (code, name, http_method, path_pattern, status) VALUES (#{code}, #{name}, #{httpMethod}, #{pathPattern}, #{status})
mapper.select: SELECT id, code, name, http_method, path_pattern, status, created_at, updated_at FROM sys_api_permission WHERE id = #{id}
SELECT id, code, name, http_method, path_pattern, status, created_at, updated_at FROM sys_api_permission ORDER BY id
mapper.update: UPDATE sys_api_permission SET code = #{code}, name = #{name}, http_method = #{httpMethod}, path_pattern = #{pathPattern}, status = #{status}, updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM sys_api_permission WHERE code = #{code} AND id != #{excludeId}

SELECT DISTINCT r.id, r.code, r.name, r.status, r.created_at, r.updated_at FROM sys_role r INNER JOIN employee_role er ON er.role_id = r.id WHERE er.employee_id = #{employeeId} AND r.status = 1 ORDER BY r.id

SELECT DISTINCT m.id, m.parent_id, m.name, m.path, m.component, m.permission, m.type, m.sort_order, m.status, m.created_at, m.updated_at FROM sys_menu m INNER JOIN role_menu rm ON rm.menu_id = m.id INNER JOIN employee_role er ON er.role_id = rm.role_id INNER JOIN sys_role r ON r.id = er.role_id WHERE er.employee_id = #{employeeId} AND r.status = 1 AND m.status = 1 ORDER BY m.sort_order, m.id

SELECT DISTINCT p.id, p.code, p.name, p.http_method, p.path_pattern, p.status, p.created_at, p.updated_at FROM sys_api_permission p INNER JOIN role_api_permission rp ON rp.api_permission_id = p.id INNER JOIN employee_role er ON er.role_id = rp.role_id INNER JOIN sys_role r ON r.id = er.role_id WHERE er.employee_id = #{employeeId} AND r.status = 1 AND p.status = 1 ORDER BY p.id
